title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Books - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Books - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Books in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Books:
Landmark Books is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books!
